compiled_state.title: [worktree-cleanup]: sprint/debug-everything session ends -> agent worktrees not removed, accumulating across sessions
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior

#### Expected Behavior

Agent worktrees created during sprint or debug-everything sessions (via worktree isolation) should be cleaned up by the orchestrator at the end of the session that created them. Merged + clean worktrees should be removed; worktrees with uncommitted changes or unmerged branches should at minimum be flagged and surfaced for user action. No worktrees should silently persist across sessions.

#### Actual Behavior

26 worktrees have accumulated, some dating back to 2026-04-16 (4+ days old). The cleanup log shows no worktrees are being automatically removed — the cleanup script finds reasons to keep all of them (stashes, uncommitted changes, not-merged status), but many of these are stale artifact states from completed sub-agent runs that were never harvested or cleaned up. Example entries from the log:

- worktree-20260416-180054: merged=yes, clean=yes → kept due to stashes
- worktree-20260416-180832: merged=yes, clean=yes → kept due to unpushed commits
- agent-a120c282: merged=yes, clean=no → kept due to uncommitted changes
- agent-a61965e1: merged=yes, clean=yes → kept due to stashes
- (18 more agent-* worktrees in similar states)

The orchestrator (sprint/debug-everything) does not include a cleanup pass at session end to remove worktrees it created, leaving them to accumulate indefinitely.

### 3. Action History and Workarounds

* **Steps Taken:**
  * User ran worktree cleanup log inspection, observed 26 accumulated worktrees
* **Raw Results:**
  * See user-provided cleanup log in ticket description
* **Known Workarounds:** Manual inspection and removal by user

### 6. Logs

Worktree Cleanup Log (user-provided):
```
  #   Name                            Merged   Clean   Active   Action
  1   wt                              no       yes     no       - keep (not merged)
  2   worktree-20260416-180054        yes      yes     no       - keep (has stashes)
  3   worktree-20260416-180832        yes      yes     no       - keep (unpushed commits)
  4   worktree-20260416-185252        no       no      no       - keep (not merged)
  5   worktree-20260416-205748        yes      yes     no       - keep (unpushed commits)
  6   worktree-20260417-103317        yes      yes     no       - keep (unpushed commits)
  7   worktree-20260417-111430        yes      yes     no       - keep (unpushed commits)
  8   worktree-20260419-210319        no       yes     YES      - keep (active session)
  9   worktree-20260420-091920        no       no      YES      - keep (active session)
 10   agent-a120c282                  yes      no      no       - keep (uncommitted changes)
 11   agent-a61965e1                  yes      yes     no       - keep (has stashes)
 12   agent-a64505e8                  no       yes     no       - keep (not merged)
 13   agent-a7451c2f                  yes      no      no       - keep (uncommitted changes)
 14   agent-a7b528a3                  yes      yes     no       - keep (has stashes)
 15   agent-a82ce246                  yes      no      no       - keep (uncommitted changes)
```
